Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 ANTI RAGGING COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar has a zero tolerance policy to ragging. As per the guidelines from AICTE, UGC and Anna University and Directorate of Technical Education- TamilNadu, Anti-Ragging Committee is constituted at Sri Eshwar College with members from academics, government departments, NGO/society, parents and students. The Committee discharges its duty to preserve a Culture of Ragging Free Environment in the College Campus. OBJECTIVES Anti Ragging committee serves to ensure the campus has no incidents however minor related to ragging or bullying of any student. We promote an environment where students feel free to express themselves and share any incidents big or small which can be acted up immediately. Ensure that any grievance related to ragging or bullying, however small, can be investigated thoroughly and disciplinary action taken should the issue be justified. NODAL OFFICER Dr.N.Shanmugasundaram Professor and Head, ECE Department hodece@sece.ac.in / +91 98427 04129 Dr.G.Karuppusami Dean – Research and Innovations karuppusami.g@sece.ac.in / +91 9894606677
